parts: Cephalorrhynchus hispidus, also known as the hispid goat grass or meadow goat grass, is a plant species with various potential medicinal properties. The medicinal parts of Cephalorrhynchus hispidus are its flowers, leaves, and roots, which are traditionally used in herbal medicine. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The exact composition of the plant's medicinal properties is still being researched and studied by scientists. Further studies are needed to confirm the efficacy and potential uses of Cephalorrhynchus hispidus in modern medicine.
